---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r, "functions"}
### SAVE FIGS, VOLCANO FUNCTIONS
save.figs <- function(p1,out.dir,base.fn,width,height){
    fn=paste0(base.fn,'.png')
    ggsave(file.path(out.dir,fn),
           plot = p1,
           width = width,
           height = height,
           units = 'in')
    fn=paste0(base.fn,'.pdf')
    ggsave(file.path(out.dir,fn),
           plot = p1,
           width = width,
           height = height,
           units = 'in')
}

volcano.plot <- function(de,p_thresh,log_thresh,title){
    max_abs_x <- max(abs(de$log2FC))
    suppressWarnings({
        p1 <- ggplot(data=de, aes(x=log2FC, y=-log10(p.adj+1e-300), col=diffexpressed, label=delabel)) +
                    geom_point() + 
                    theme_minimal() +
                    geom_text_repel() +
                    scale_color_manual(values=c("blue", "black", "red")) +
                    geom_vline(xintercept=c(-log_thresh, log_thresh), col="red") +
                    geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(p_thresh), col="red") +
                    ggtitle(title) +  xlim(-1.05 * max_abs_x, 1.05 * max_abs_x)
    })
    return(p1)
}

# Annotation color generator
ann.colors <- function(annotation_col, sub) {
  color_map <- list(
    PFS.6month      = c("NoPrg6M"       = "coral",       "Prg6M"       = "slateblue"),
    timepoint       = c("Baseline"       = "grey90",      "Week4"       = "hotpink1",  "Week12.or.16" = "purple"),
    treatment       = c("combo"          = "grey60",      "nivo"        = "cyan",      "rela"         = "magenta"),
    gen_cell_types2 = c("CD8plus.T.cell" = "yellowgreen", "Macrophages" = "violet",    "Treg"         = "#FDC086")
  )

  present_tags <- colnames(annotation_col)
  matched      <- intersect(present_tags, names(color_map))
  unmatched    <- setdiff(present_tags, names(color_map))

  if (length(unmatched) > 0)
    warning("No color definition for tag(s), pheatmap will auto-color: ",
            paste(unmatched, collapse = ", "))

  result <- list()
  for (tag in matched) {
    actual_levels <- unique(as.character(annotation_col[[tag]]))
    actual_levels <- actual_levels[!is.na(actual_levels)]
    defined       <- color_map[[tag]]

    missing_levels <- setdiff(actual_levels, names(defined))
    if (length(missing_levels) > 0)
      warning("Tag '", tag, "' levels in data not in color definition: ",
              paste(missing_levels, collapse = ", "))

    result[[tag]] <- defined[intersect(names(defined), actual_levels)]
  }
  result
}

# Manual row-scaling
row.scale <- function(mat) {
  t(apply(mat, 1, function(x) {
    s <- sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (is.na(s) || s == 0) return(rep(0, length(x)))
    (x - mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)) / s
  }))
}

# pheatmap wrapper
pheatmap.wrapper <- function(lognorm.dat, annotation_col, ann_colors, title,
                             cluster_rows = TRUE,
                             cluster_cols = FALSE) {
  pheatmap::pheatmap(
    lognorm.dat,
    main              = title,
    scale             = "none",
    annotation_col    = annotation_col,
    annotation_colors = ann_colors,
    clustering_method = "complete",
    cluster_rows      = cluster_rows,
    cluster_cols      = cluster_cols,
    color             = colorRampPalette(c("navy", "white", "orangered"))(100),
    show_colnames     = FALSE,
    show_rownames     = TRUE
  )
}

# Main heatmap function
# No artifact re-filtering here: de is already filtered at generation time
heatmap.plot <- function(de, sub, title, ds.pt = 100,
                         ndeg_top_bottom = 15,
                         p.thresh        = 0.05,
                         plot.tag        = c('PFS.6month', 'timepoint', 'treatment', 'gen_cell_types2')) {

  DefaultAssay(sub) <- "RNA"
  Idents(sub)       <- 'gen_cell_types2'

  # Drop cells with NA in the ident slot before downsampling —
  # subset(downsample=) silently removes NA-ident cells, which can collapse
  # the assay layer from a matrix to a vector and cause "incorrect number of dimensions"
  na.cells <- is.na(sub@meta.data[['gen_cell_types2']])
  if (any(na.cells)) {
    message(sprintf("Removing %d cells with NA gen_cell_types2 before downsampling: %s",
                    sum(na.cells), title))
    sub <- sub[, !na.cells]
  }

  # Guard: check cell count before downsampling (not after, where the error occurs)
  if (ncol(sub) < 2) {
    message(sprintf("Too few cells before downsampling (%d) for heatmap: %s", ncol(sub), title))
    return(NA)
  }

  suppressWarnings({ sub <- subset(sub, downsample = ds.pt) })

  # Guard: check again after downsampling
  if (ncol(sub) < 2) {
    message(sprintf("Too few cells after downsampling (%d) for heatmap: %s", ncol(sub), title))
    return(NA)
  }

  missing_tags <- setdiff(plot.tag, colnames(sub@meta.data))
  if (length(missing_tags) > 0)
    warning("plot.tag(s) not found in metadata and skipped: ",
            paste(missing_tags, collapse = ", "))

  annotation_col <- sub@meta.data %>%
    select(any_of(plot.tag)) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), as.character)) %>%
    as.data.frame()

  ann_colors <- ann.colors(annotation_col, sub)

  top    <- de %>% filter(p_val_adj < p.thresh, avg_log2FC >  0) %>% top_n(ndeg_top_bottom, wt =  avg_log2FC)
  bottom <- de %>% filter(p_val_adj < p.thresh, avg_log2FC <  0) %>% top_n(ndeg_top_bottom, wt = -avg_log2FC)

  use.genes <- unique(rbind(top, bottom)$Gene)

  # Guard: require at least 2 genes for a meaningful heatmap
  if (length(use.genes) < 2) {
    message(sprintf("Too few DEGs for heatmap (%d gene(s), p<%.3f): %s",
                    length(use.genes), p.thresh, title))
    return(NA)
  }

  available.genes <- intersect(use.genes, rownames(sub[["RNA"]]))
  if (length(available.genes) < length(use.genes))
    warning("Some genes not found in RNA assay and dropped: ",
            paste(setdiff(use.genes, available.genes), collapse = ", "))

  if (length(available.genes) < 2) {
    message(sprintf("Fewer than 2 genes available in RNA assay for heatmap: %s", title))
    return(NA)
  }

  # Seurat v5 returns a dgCMatrix from LayerData(). Subsetting a dgCMatrix with a
  # single gene collapses it to a vector even with drop=FALSE (Matrix package behaviour).
  # Solution: convert the full layer to a dense matrix FIRST, then subset.
  # For large objects this is memory-intensive but unavoidable for correctness.
  keep.cells <- intersect(row.names(annotation_col), colnames(sub))
  full.layer  <- as.matrix(LayerData(sub, assay = "RNA", layer = "data"))
  lognorm.dat <- full.layer[available.genes, keep.cells, drop = FALSE]

  # Guard: Inf/-Inf → NA
  lognorm.dat[is.infinite(lognorm.dat)] <- NA

  # Guard: drop all-NA rows
  all.na.rows <- apply(lognorm.dat, 1, function(x) all(is.na(x)))
  if (any(all.na.rows)) {
    warning("Dropping ", sum(all.na.rows), " gene(s) with all-NA expression")
    lognorm.dat <- lognorm.dat[!all.na.rows, , drop = FALSE]
  }

  # Guard: impute remaining NAs with row mean
  lognorm.dat <- t(apply(lognorm.dat, 1, function(x) {
    x[is.na(x)] <- mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
    x
  }))

  # Guard: drop zero/NA variance columns
  col.var       <- apply(lognorm.dat, 2, var)
  zero.var.cols <- is.na(col.var) | col.var == 0
  if (any(zero.var.cols)) {
    warning("Dropping ", sum(zero.var.cols), " cell(s) with zero/NA variance")
    lognorm.dat    <- lognorm.dat[, !zero.var.cols, drop = FALSE]
    annotation_col <- annotation_col[!zero.var.cols, , drop = FALSE]
  }

  # Manual row scaling
  lognorm.dat <- row.scale(lognorm.dat)

  # Guard: final dimension and value check
  if (nrow(lognorm.dat) <= 1 || ncol(lognorm.dat) <= 1) {
    warning("Too few genes/cells remain after cleaning for: ", title)
    return(NA)
  }

  if (any(is.nan(lognorm.dat)) || any(is.infinite(lognorm.dat))) {
    warning("NaN/Inf remain after cleaning, skipping heatmap for: ", title)
    return(NA)
  }

  pheatmap.wrapper(lognorm.dat, annotation_col, ann_colors, title)
}
```

```{r, "artifact filter"}
# --- Artifact filter ---
# H2A./H2B. use dot separator to avoid over-matching (e.g. H2AC*, H2BC* are histones,
# but bare "H2A"/"H2B" prefixes were too greedy in earlier versions)
is_artifact <- function(gene) {
  histone_prefixes <- c("HIST", "H1F", "H2AF", "H3F", "H4F",
                        "H1-", "H2A.", "H2B.", "H3-", "H4-", "H1.")

  grepl("^ENSG", gene) |                 # unannotated Ensembl IDs
  grepl("^MT-", gene) |                  # mitochondrial genes
  grepl("^MTRN", gene) |                 # mitochondrial RNA genes
  sapply(gene, function(g)               # histone genes
    any(startsWith(g, histone_prefixes))) |
  grepl("^AC[0-9]+", gene) |            # uncharacterized AC loci
  grepl("^AL[0-9]+", gene) |            # uncharacterized AL loci
  grepl("^LINC", gene) |                # lncRNAs
  grepl("-AS[0-9]+$", gene)             # antisense transcripts
}
```

```{r}
#FIXED BY CLAUDE
#TIL LOOP SETUP
prj = "HCC-CBS-253-Hillman-LKarapetyan-scRNAseq-revise"
base = file.path('/ix/rbao/Projects', prj)
data = file.path(base,'results','jwork')
scripts= file.path(base,'scripts')
results = file.path(base,'results','jwork')
cell.types <- unique(dat_tmde@meta.data$gen_cell_types2)
##TIL LOOP SETUP 2
use.tags <- c('PFS.6month','treatment', 'timepoint')
test <- 'MAST'
log.name <- "avg_log2FC"
p.name <- 'p_val_adj'
p = 0.001
log_threshes = c(1, 1.5)
save.filtered <- TRUE
width = 8
height = 6
v=4
suppressWarnings({
    out.gene.lists <- file.path(results,sprintf('DEG_contrasts_TIL_%s_v%d',test,v),'csv')
    dir.create(out.gene.lists,recursive = TRUE)
    filt.out.gene.lists <- file.path(results,sprintf('DEG_contrasts_TIL_%s_v%d',test,v),'filtered_csv')
    dir.create(filt.out.gene.lists,recursive = TRUE)
    out.de.volcano <- file.path(results,sprintf('DEG_contrasts_TIL_%s_v%d',test,v),'volcano')
    dir.create(out.de.volcano,recursive=TRUE)
    out.de.heatmap <- file.path(results,sprintf('DEG_contrasts_TIL_%s_v%d',test,v),'heatmap')
    dir.create(out.de.heatmap,recursive=TRUE)
})
plot.volc <- TRUE
plot.heat <- TRUE
min.pct <- 0.03
min.cells.feat = 20
tissue.types <- c('TIL')
treatments <- c('rela', 'nivo', 'combo')
timepoints <- c('Baseline','Week4')
PFS.6month <- c('Prg6M','NoPrg6M')

#TIL LOOP
system.time({
for (log_thresh in log_threshes){
for (time in timepoints){
  time.sub <- subset(dat_tmde, subset = timepoint == time)
  for (tag in use.tags){
    if (tag == 'PFS.6month'){
      idents <- c('NoPrg6M','Prg6M')
    } else if (tag == 'timepoint'){
      idents <- c('Week4','Baseline')
    } else if (tag == 'treatment'){
      idents <- c('combo','rela','nivo')
    } else {
      idents <- c('yes','no')
    }

    # Define pairwise contrasts
    if (tag == 'treatment'){
      contrast.pairs <- list(c('combo','rela'), c('combo','nivo'), c('rela','nivo'))
    } else {
      contrast.pairs <- list(idents[1:2])
    }

    comp.sub <- subset(time.sub, subset = !!sym(tag) %in% idents)

    for (tissue in tissue.types){
      tissue.sub <- subset(comp.sub, subset = sample_type == tissue)

      for (trt in treatments){
        # Don't subset by treatment when treatment IS the comparison tag
        if (tag == 'treatment'){
          if (trt != treatments[1]) next  # run only once for treatment comparisons
          treat.sub <- tissue.sub         # keep all treatments present
        } else {
          treat.sub <- subset(tissue.sub, subset = treatment == trt)
        }

        for (cell in cell.types){
          # Guard: skip if no cells found
          if (ncol(treat.sub) == 0){
            message('Skipping: no cells for trt=', trt, ' tissue=', tissue, ' tag=', tag)
            next
          }

          if (cell != 'all.cells'){
            sub <- suppressWarnings(subset(treat.sub, subset = general_cell_type == cell))
          } else {
            sub <- treat.sub
          }

          # Guard: skip if subset is empty
          if (ncol(sub) == 0){
            message('Skipping: no cells for cell=', cell)
            next
          }

          DefaultAssay(sub) <- "RNA"
          Idents(sub) <- tag

          # Title
          if (tag == 'PFS.6month'){
            title = sprintf('NoPrg6m vs Prg6M, %s DEGs', cell)
          } else if (tag == 'timepoint'){
            title = sprintf('Week4 vs Baseline, %s DEGs', cell)
          } else if (tag == 'treatment'){
            title = sprintf('Treatment comparisons, %s DEGs', cell)
          } else {
            title = sprintf('yes vs no, %s DEGs', cell)
          }
          title = paste(tissue, title)

          # Loop over pairwise contrasts
          for (pair in contrast.pairs){
            ident.1 <- pair[1]
            ident.2 <- pair[2]

            # Guard: check both idents exist in this subset
            available.idents <- unique(as.character(sub[[tag]][,1]))
            if (!ident.1 %in% available.idents | !ident.2 %in% available.idents){
              message('Skipping: missing ident in subset. Need: ', ident.1, ' and ',
                      ident.2, '. Found: ', paste(available.idents, collapse=', '))
              next
            }

            # Update title for pairwise treatment contrasts
            if (tag == 'treatment'){
              title = sprintf('%s vs %s, %s DEGs', ident.1, ident.2, cell)
              title = paste(tissue, title)
            }

            contrast.str <- paste0(time,'.',trt,'.',tissue,'.',
                                   tag,'.',ident.1,'.vs.',ident.2)
            base.fn <- sprintf('%s.%s.DEG.p%1.3f.log.%1.1f.%s.%d.minpct.v%d',
                               contrast.str, cell, p, log_thresh, test, min.pct*100, v)
            base.fn <- stringr::str_replace_all(base.fn, ' ', '.')
            fn <- paste0(base.fn, '.csv')

            if (file.exists(file.path(out.gene.lists, fn))){
              print(paste('Loading', fn))
              de <- read.csv(file.path(out.gene.lists, fn), row.names=1)
            } else {
              print(paste('Generating', fn))
              markers <- tryCatch({
                FindMarkers(object = sub,
                            ident.1 = ident.1,
                            ident.2 = ident.2,
                            base = 2,
                            min.pct = min.pct,
                            min.cells.feature = min.cells.feat,
                            min.cells.group = 50,
                            test.use = 'MAST')
              }, error = function(e){
                message('FindMarkers failed for ', contrast.str, ': ', e$message)
                return(NULL)
              })

              if (is.null(markers) || nrow(markers) == 0){
                message('No markers found for ', contrast.str, ', skipping')
                next
              }

              de <- markers
              de$Gene <- row.names(markers)
              # Artifact filter: applied once at generation time, not again in plot functions
              before <- nrow(de)
              de <- de %>% filter(!is_artifact(Gene))
              message(sprintf("Filtered %d artifact genes (%.1f%%) before saving %s",
                      before - nrow(de), 100 * (before - nrow(de)) / before, title))
              de$log2FC <- de[[log.name]]
              max_fc <- 100
              de <- de %>%
                mutate(
                  log2FC = case_when(
                    log2FC == Inf    ~ max_fc,
                    log2FC > max_fc  ~ max_fc,
                    log2FC < -max_fc ~ -max_fc,
                    log2FC == -Inf   ~ -max_fc,
                    TRUE             ~ log2FC
                  )
                ) %>%
                filter(!is.na(p_val_adj))

              de$p.adj <- de[[p.name]]
              de$diffexpressed <- "NO"
              de$diffexpressed[de$log2FC > log_thresh  & de$p.adj < p] <- "UP"
              de$diffexpressed[de$log2FC < -log_thresh & de$p.adj < p] <- "DOWN"
              de$diffexpressed <- as.character(de$diffexpressed)
              de$delabel <- NA
              de$delabel[de$diffexpressed != "NO"] <- de$Gene[de$diffexpressed != "NO"]
              de <- de %>% arrange(-log2FC, p_val_adj)
              de$contrast <- contrast.str

              write.csv(de, file.path(out.gene.lists, fn))
            }

            if (save.filtered){
              filt.de <- de %>% filter(diffexpressed %in% c('UP','DOWN'))
              fn.filt <- paste0('filt.', base.fn, '.csv')
              write.csv(filt.de, file.path(filt.out.gene.lists, fn.filt))
            }

            if (plot.volc){
              p1 <- volcano.plot(de, p, log_thresh, title)
              save.figs(p1, out.de.volcano, base.fn, width=width, height=height)
            }

            if (plot.heat){
              # ds.pt=30 for all.cells (up from 10) to reduce empty-matrix errors
              # in sparse TIL subsets; ndeg scaled accordingly
              if (cell == 'all.cells'){ ds.pt <- 30;  ndeg <- 10
              } else {                  ds.pt <- 200; ndeg <- 15 }

              p2 <- tryCatch({
                heatmap.plot(de, sub, title, plot.tag = tag,
                             ndeg_top_bottom = ndeg, p.thresh = 0.05,  # looser than DEG calling threshold for display
                             ds.pt = ds.pt)
              }, error = function(e) {
                warning("heatmap.plot error for ", base.fn, ": ", e$message)
                NA
              })

              # pheatmap returns a list; NA (too few genes/cells) returns logical
              if (is.list(p2)) {
                save.figs(p2, out.de.heatmap, base.fn, width=10, height=5)
              }
            }

          } # end pair loop
        } # end cell loop
      } # end trt loop
    } # end tissue loop
  } # end tag loop
} # end time loop
} # end log_thresh loop
}) # end system.time
```
